title: Tori Wells
compiled_truth: Tori Wells is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-07-25), Tori Wells sent 35 and received 95 emails, totalling 130 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rosalee Fleming](people/rosalee-fleming) (9), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (5), [Katherine Brown](people/katherine-brown) (4), [Mark Koenig](people/mark-koenig) (4), [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (4). Mailbox folders observed: _sent, discussion_threads, ken_lay, sent.
